intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the visual evidence. All pots appear to be devoid of the specified botanical specimens. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is absent from the P3 pot in all frames.

plant_audit.p1_yellow_pot: Empty. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.p2_black_pot: Empty. No signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Empty. No signs of Pothos or scale anchor.
plant_audit.p4_shared_black_pot: Empty. No signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp, and undisturbed substrate observed across all containers.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of white, calcified fragments (resembling crushed eggshells) in the foreground black pot. A metallic object (spoon) appears in the yellow pot at T-3, and a cylindrical white object (possibly a marker or tool) appears in the yellow pot from T-2 to Current.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: No significant change; pots remain empty.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Removal of spoon; introduction of a white cylindrical object into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Static state; no further biological development.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological vacancy. There is no evidence of plant life, germination, or decay of previously existing specimens. The environment is strictly abiotic.
anomalies: Introduction of non-botanical artifacts (spoon, cylindrical marker) into the yellow pot.
Presence of white calcified debris in the black pot.
Complete absence of the registered plant species.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots are currently serving as containers for soil and miscellaneous non-botanical debris. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is missing, suggesting a total reset or failure of the documented biome. The environment is currently sterile regarding the registered flora.
